question: Chapters
feedback: The passage only contains a timetable of activities and deadlines; it does not list or name any of the main sections or chapters of the thesis.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of any section; the text merely enumerates tasks without explaining what each will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: Because only a schedule is presented, the general structure (e.g., introduction, literature review, methodology, results, discussion, conclusion) is not evident from the text.
